_unofficial: UNOFFICIAL — ~/.claude.json is not a native Claude Code config format as of April 2026. This file is aspirational workspace documentation. Per-task model routing and workspace scoping are not supported in settings.json. Approximate each feature using the noted workarounds.

workspace._note: Workaround: add ~/code project paths to Claude Code's trusted directories via settings.json allowedDirectories if/when supported.

models._note: Workaround: use `meta+p` (model picker) or `/model <id>` in-session to switch. These are documented preferences, not enforced config.

strictness._note: Workaround: these are enforced via PHPStan/Pint in CI, not by Claude Code settings.
